title: Opening for Category Manager at Myntra International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Opening for Category Manager at Myntra International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Myntra International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Category Manager for our Chandigarh operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Myntra International Enterprises:
Myntra International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Myntra International Enterprises!
